name: Legendary Mahjong 2
short_description: Legendary Mahjong 2 returns with another gripping battle of the gods! Restore the temples of the gods to their former glory and reunite with your beloved! Conquer evil in 7 different game modes.
detailed_description:
Legendary Mahjong 2 returns with another gripping battle of the gods! Peaceful life in the temples of Shambhala has come to an end. Thanatos, the evil god, has taken advantage of the gods departure and has abducted the goddess of beauty. Now, it's up to Kokopelli to restore the temples to their former glory and reunite with his beloved! Conquer evil in Legendary Mahjong 2.

  • Conquer over 500 thrilling adventure levels!

  • Challenge yourself with 7 different games modes.

  • Solve over 300 exciting levels in Classic Mode!

  • Enjoy stunning graphics and relax to soothing music.

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Dutch, Russian
*languages with full audio support
